name: Turrican 30th Anniversary
description: The 30th anniversary revival of Turrican, marking the return of Factor 5's run-and-gun series to modern consoles through new anthology releases.
notes: Announced during Gamescom Opening Night Live 2020 as a 30th anniversary revival. The campaign led to Turrican Flashback and the later Turrican Anthology releases for modern platforms.
